none.justification: Matched the E1000E Kconfig declaration, local Makefile rule/object list, vendor Makefile line, NET_VENDOR_INTEL and ETHERNET Makefile gates, and correctly stated drivers/Makefile:95 is unconditional. However it failed to identify the NETDEVICES/NET Kconfig wrapping and omitted Kbuild:94, leaving a real gap in the required full gating chain.

ccodegraph.justification: Got the main Kconfig line, local and vendor Makefile rules, object list, NET_VENDOR_INTEL/ETHERNET/NETDEVICES Kconfig layers, and the unconditional drivers/Makefile line. It has a factual object-count error and its final summary misleadingly treats CONFIG_NETDEVICES as part of the kbuild recursion chain, while omitting Kbuild:94.

codegraph.justification: Fully covers the Kconfig declaration, both E1000E Makefile rules, the complete 11-object list, the Makefile descent chain including Kbuild:94 and unconditional drivers/Makefile:95, and the relevant Kconfig gates. It also correctly avoids the trap of treating CONFIG_NET as the drivers/net Makefile gate.

cbm.justification: Correctly identifies the Kconfig declaration, the driver-local rule/object list, NETDEVICES/ETHERNET/NET_VENDOR_INTEL Kconfig gates, drivers/net and ethernet Makefile gates, vendor Makefile line, and unconditional drivers/Makefile:95. It omits Kbuild:94 and does not explicitly include the NET Kconfig dependency in the gating enumeration, so it is mostly correct but incomplete.
